turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Hello, I'm staying at this hotel and I believe I left my phone in the lobby. Could you help me to check?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Of course, I'd be happy to help! Let me quickly check with our lobby staff and see if your phone was found. Could you describe the phone for me, like the model or color?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Oh, my phone is iPhone and the gray color with a blue case and a big scratch in the back.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Got it, that helps a lot! Let me check with our team in the lobby and see if we have it. In the meantime, can you let me know the approximate time you were in the lobby?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Um, I don't know exactly, but maybe it's 3pm around.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, that’s helpful. I’ll let them know it was around 3 p.m. and the details you provided. I’ll check and get back to you in just a moment. In the meantime, is there anything else I can assist you with?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “What happens if someone finds it?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: If someone finds it, we usually keep it at the front desk for safekeeping, and we’ll try to contact you right away. So, rest assured, we’ll do our best to get it back to you as soon as possible! Let me check in with the staff and I’ll let you know.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Okay, then, can I leave my contact details?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely, that would be great! If you could share your name and the best phone number or email to reach you, I'll make sure we have that on file so we can contact you as soon as we find your phone.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Okay, my name is Weber, and if you find my phones, please contact my Instagram, please.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Got it, Weber! I'll make a note of that and let the team know to reach out through your Instagram if we find it. I’ll keep you updated as soon as I have any news. Let me know if there's anything else I can do for you in the meantime!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Do you know my Instagram ID?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: I’m afraid I don’t have that information on hand, but if you’d like, you can share your Instagram handle with me, and I’ll make sure we have it noted down. Just let me know whenever you’re ready!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Okay, my Instagram ID is weber.877.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Perfect, thank you for that! I’ll make sure we have your Instagram handle noted, and we’ll reach out there if we find your phone. I’ll keep you posted as soon as I have any updates. If there’s anything else, just let me know!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Thank you. I appreciate your help.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: You’re very welcome! I’m happy to help. I’ll be in touch as soon as we have any news. In the meantime, if you need anything else, just let me know.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Okay, then, could you, could I borrow a subphone? I want to call my parents, but I don't have any phone. Just this hotel telephone. So, could you borrow any phone or telephone or something?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Of course, absolutely! You’re more than welcome to use the hotel phone to call your parents. Just let me know if you need any assistance with that, and I’m happy to help set it up for you!

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “So, can I use this hotel telephone?”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Absolutely, you can! Just let me know the number you’d like to call, and I’ll make sure we get you set up right away. Feel free to let me know whenever you’re ready.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: “Okay, thank you.”

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: You're very welcome! If you need anything else at all, just let me know. I’m here to help.
